description: Scaffold the Cargo workspace with core, commands, and cli crates
acceptance_criteria: The workspace Cargo.toml lists crates/core, crates/commands, crates/cli, and src-tauri as members
crates/core and crates/commands are lib crates; crates/cli is a bin crate
crates/commands depends on crates/core; crates/cli depends on crates/commands
crates/cli has no dependency on tauri
cargo build succeeds for the entire workspace

description: Extract SessionRegistry and LayoutStore into crates/core and verify existing tests pass
acceptance_criteria: SessionRegistry and LayoutStore are public modules in crates/core
All existing unit tests for SessionRegistry pass under crates/core
All existing unit tests for LayoutStore pass under crates/core
cargo test --package core succeeds with zero failures

description: Implement the Command enum, CommandResult enum, CommandError, and executor in crates/commands
acceptance_criteria: Command enum has 18 variants covering Session, Template, and Workspace operations
CommandResult enum has Session, Sessions, Layout, Layouts, Workspace, Workspaces, and Unit variants
CommandError wraps core errors with context about which command failed and why
CommandError serializes to JSON with stable variant codes written to stderr
AppState struct wraps SessionRegistry and LayoutStore and is the state container for execute()
execute() accepts &mut AppState and dispatches each Command variant to the correct core method
Executor tests cover happy paths and error cases (not-found for session, template, workspace)

description: Build the CLI binary with session create, list, rename, delete, open, and close subcommands
acceptance_criteria: aiaws session create and list subcommands return correct JSON responses
aiaws session rename and delete subcommands return correct JSON responses
aiaws session open auto-creates a default Layout Template and Workspace Instance if none exist
aiaws session --help shows all available subcommands
Errors return non-zero exit codes with JSON error bodies on stderr

description: Build CLI subcommands for template list, save, delete, and rename
acceptance_criteria: aiaws template list returns JSON array of Layout objects
aiaws template save --name <name> --tree <json> creates a template and returns JSON
aiaws template save --name <name> --tree-file <path> reads tree JSON from a file
aiaws template save --name <name> with no tree flag uses the default single-panel layout
aiaws template delete and rename subcommands return correct JSON responses

description: Build CLI subcommands for workspace list, get-active, add, remove, rename, set-active, update-tree, and reset
acceptance_criteria: aiaws workspace list and get-active return JSON arrays and objects respectively
aiaws workspace add --session-id <id> --template-id <tid> creates a WorkspaceInstance and returns JSON
aiaws workspace remove, rename, and set-active subcommands return correct JSON responses
aiaws workspace update-tree accepts --tree <json> and --tree-file <path> for layout modifications
aiaws workspace reset --session-id <id> --workspace-id <wid> resets to template and returns JSON

description: Rewire src-tauri to depend on crates/commands and dispatch through the Command Layer
acceptance_criteria: src-tauri/Cargo.toml depends on the commands crate instead of importing core directly
Every Tauri command function constructs a Command variant, calls execute(), and unwraps the CommandResult
The existing AppState struct is replaced with the one from the commands crate
cargo build --package ai-agent-workspace succeeds
The Tauri app launches and existing Session and Template CRUD works through the GUI
